title: Jamaican Fish Cakes
description: A delicious and flavorful Caribbean-inspired dish made with flaky fish, spices, and herbs, perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: 1. Cut the fish into small pieces and place in a bowl.
2. Add the hash, jamaican seasoning, lime juice, salt, and pepper to the bowl with the fish. Mix well.
3. Beat the eggs in a separate bowl.
4. Dip each piece of fish into the eggs and then coat in the breading mix.
5. Heat a large skillet over medium heat.
6. Add a small amount of oil to the skillet.
7. Place the coated fish pieces in the skillet and cook for 3-4 minutes on each side.
8. Serve the fish cakes hot with your favorite sides, such as coleslaw or fries.
9. Garnish with chopped fresh herbs, such as parsley or cilantro.
